STAGE_RESULTS = {}

def run_preprocessing(data):
    global STAGE_RESULTS
    cleaned = [remove_nulls(row) for row in data]
    STAGE_RESULTS["preprocessing"] = len(cleaned)
    return cleaned

def run_feature_engineering(data):
    global STAGE_RESULTS
    features = [extract_features(row) for row in data]
    STAGE_RESULTS["features"] = len(features)
    return features

def run_training(data):
    global STAGE_RESULTS
    model = train_model(data)
    STAGE_RESULTS["model_score"] = model.score()
    return model

METRIC_CACHE = []

def compute_metrics(dataset):
    global METRIC_CACHE
    for batch in dataset.batches():
        result = evaluate(batch)
        METRIC_CACHE.append(result)
    return METRIC_CACHE
